languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

languages.text: "Ха! Холод и соленый воздух — это местечко мне по душе. Если бы не вонь горелого прометия и чужого предательства, было бы точь-в-точь, как на Фенрисе, когда приходит оттепель".
languages.translation_comment: characters landed on a planet where it is raining heavily, everything around is wet

languages.text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."
languages.original_text: "Ха! Холод и соленый воздух — это местечко мне по душе. Если бы не вонь горелого прометия и чужого предательства, было бы точь-в-точь, как на Фенрисе, когда приходит оттепель".

"Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."
"Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

languages.text: 「ハッ！凍てつく寒さと塩の匂い。この場所は私を呼んでいる。プロメシウムの燃焼臭と異種族の裏切り臭がなければ、解氷期を迎えたフェンリスと変わらないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

traits.locale_text: 「ハッ！凍てつく寒さと塩の匂い。この場所は私を呼んでいる。プロメシウムの燃焼臭と異種族の裏切り臭がなければ、解氷期を迎えたフェンリスと変わらないだろう。」

languages.text: « Ha ! Un froid glacial et le goût du sel dans l'air. Cet endroit me plaît. Si on fait abstraction de la puanteur du prométhium en combustion et de la traîtrise des xénos, on se croirait sur Fenris pendant la saison du dégel. »
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

traits.locale_text: « Ha ! Un froid glacial et le goût du sel dans l'air. Cet endroit me plaît. Si on fait abstraction de la puanteur du prométhium en combustion et de la traîtrise des xénos, on se croirait sur Fenris pendant la saison du dégel. »

languages.text: "Ha! Eiskalt und Salz auf der Haut ... ein Ort nach meinem Geschmack. Ohne den Gestank von brennendem Promethium und widerlichen Xenos wäre es hier wie auf Fenris im Frühling."
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

traits.locale_text: "Ha! Eiskalt und Salz auf der Haut ... ein Ort nach meinem Geschmack. Ohne den Gestank von brennendem Promethium und widerlichen Xenos wäre es hier wie auf Fenris im Frühling."

languages.text: "Ha! Dondurucu soğuk ve tuzlu hava... Burası beni çağırıyor. Yanan prometyum kokusu ve zeno ihaneti olmasaydı tıpkı çözülme zamanındaki Fenris gibi olurdu."
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

traits.locale_text: "Ha! Dondurucu soğuk ve tuzlu hava... Burası beni çağırıyor. Yanan prometyum kokusu ve zeno ihaneti olmasaydı tıpkı çözülme zamanındaki Fenris gibi olurdu."

languages.text: «¡Ja! Un viento helado y salitre en el aire; yo me siento como en casa. Si no fuese por el hedor a prometio quemado y a perfidia xenos, esto sería como Fenris durante el deshielo».
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ja! Un viento helado y salitre en el aire; yo me siento como en casa. Si no fuese por el hedor a prometio quemado y a perfidia xenos, esto sería como Fenris durante el deshielo».

languages.text: “哈！刺骨的严寒与空气中的咸腥——这里正合我心意。若不是弥漫着燃烧钷素的恶臭与异形的背叛气息，这里简直就跟芬里斯解冻时一模一样。”
languages.original_text: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."
